ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "memory_layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory layout */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_memory_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("memory_layout_id") REFERENCES memory_layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_operations" (
  "op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory operation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that performed the operation */,
  "op_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation type */,
  "addr" INTEGER /* Address of the memory block being written */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory content being written */,
  "data" TEXT /* Memory content being written */,
  "mask" TEXT /* AND-mask value for masked write operations */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_operations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_operations_op_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_type_id") REFERENCES operation_types ("op_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "op_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "op_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type (e.g., write, write with mask) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory layout */,
  "layout_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory layout (e.g., 16-bit, 32-bit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory layout */,
  "num_banks" INTEGER /* Number of banks in the memory layout */,
  "bank_size" INTEGER /* Size of each bank in the memory layout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_memory" (
  "mem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory block */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that owns the memory block */,
  "addr" INTEGER /* Address of the memory block */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory block */,
  "data" TEXT /* Content of the memory block */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank that contains the memory block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_memory_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_memory_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device or memory operation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory operation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES memory_operations ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read_device, write_memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., embedded system, IoT device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memorysizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory size (e.g., 16-bit, 32-bit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addr_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address range */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that owns the address range */,
  "addr_start" INTEGER /* Start address of the range */,
  "addr_end" INTEGER /* End address of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory layout that contains the bank */,
  "bank_number" INTEGER /* Number of the bank */,
  "bank_size" INTEGER /* Size of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES memory_layouts ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory operation that was changed */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES memory_operations ("op_id")
)
